回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	112學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 英語會話(一) (English Conversation I)	開課班級 : 應英二	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 蘇淑品	必選修 : 必修	 	 


1.教學目標
Objectives: To provide students with up-to-date content, additional grammar practice, and listening and speaking practice to develop learners’ speaking and listening skills through group activities, pair work, role plays, and group discussions. 


2.教學綱要
Activities: This course will require in-class discussions, oral presentation and role plays for the topics in the textbook. There will be weekly quizzes on vocabulary. Students are encouraged to watch YouTube videos every day and discuss the content with their classmates. 


3.教科書
1	書名 : Impact Issues 2,　
出版日期 : 年 月 
作者 : Richard R. Day, Joseph Shaules and Junko Yamanaka　出版社 : Pearson Longman　版本 :  
2	書名 : Impact Issues 3　
出版日期 : 年 月 
作者 : Richard R. Day, Joseph Shaules and J. Yamanaka　出版社 : Pearson Longman　版本 :  


無參考書資料。

※請遵守智慧財產權觀念，依著作權法規定，教科書及教材不得非法影印與使用盜版軟體。

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Evaluation: Class participation, 3 Presentations: 75 % Final exam: 25 %  
Attendance: 2 class absences are permitted without penalty but all assignments are required. Make sure you contact another student for notes, assignments, or hand-outs prior to the next class. Being 10-minutes late for class is regarded as an absence. Late Assignments: All assignments are due on the dates announced. Assignments turned in after the due dates will NOT be accepted.
